title: lastrea robertiana var. longula
intro: Lastrea robertiana var. longula, also known as the Longula Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is primarily found in tropical regions, particularly in the Philippines, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Longula Lady Fern is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and rheumatism, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, with the dried fronds being steeped in hot water to make a medicinal decoction.
